context: Tests whether the agent correctly documents the pre-flight procedure, branch naming convention, tool conventions (git+pnpm locally, mcp__github__* remotely, no gh CLI), spec review gate verdicts, and the complete blocked escalation protocol.

checklist.name: Branch naming pattern
checklist.description: pre-flight-checklist.md specifies the branch name format as 'claude/impl-NNN-<slug>' (matching this exact pattern, not a variant like 'feature/', 'impl/', or without the 'claude/' prefix)

checklist.name: Spec status set In Progress
checklist.description: pre-flight-checklist.md includes the step of setting the spec status to 'In Progress' as the first commit on the implementation branch

checklist.name: Blocked verdict stops work
checklist.description: pre-flight-checklist.md specifies that a 'Needs revision' or 'Blocked' verdict from the spec review causes implementation to STOP (not proceed with warnings)

checklist.name: Warnings proceed with notes
checklist.description: pre-flight-checklist.md specifies that Warnings from the spec review allow implementation to continue, with warnings acknowledged in the implementation notes file

checklist.name: principles plugin best-effort
checklist.description: pre-flight-checklist.md describes the engineering-principles plugin as best-effort: if unavailable, note it (as principles_unavailable=true or equivalent) and continue rather than blocking

checklist.name: No gh CLI
checklist.description: tool-conventions.md explicitly states that the 'gh' CLI is NOT used for remote GitHub operations

checklist.name: mcp__github__* for remote ops
checklist.description: tool-conventions.md specifies mcp__github__* tools for remote GitHub operations

checklist.name: Slack DM tool and channel
checklist.description: tool-conventions.md or escalation-protocol.md specifies mcp__claude_ai_Slack__slack_send_message with channel $SLACK_NOTIFY_USER for blocker DMs

checklist.name: ai:blocked label target
checklist.description: escalation-protocol.md specifies applying 'ai:blocked' to the open impl PR, OR to the source SPEC PR if no impl PR exists yet

checklist.name: PR comment content
checklist.description: escalation-protocol.md specifies the PR comment must contain: one-line problem statement, one-line proposed resolution, and a link to verification output or offending diff

checklist.name: No silent partial branches
checklist.description: escalation-protocol.md states that partial-state branches must NOT be pushed without a draft PR plus a blocker comment
